author: Anonymous
title: Libellus de canone mystici libaminis / Tractatus in canone missae
remarks: [Inc.: “In uirtute sancte crucis et in sacramento altaris”][aka Sermo Petri Clarevallensis super expositionem canonis](Hauréau 1876). See also MS. Attributed to Aquinas in late mss (Graz UB 655) and early print editions. See Sancti Thomae Aquinatis Opera omnia, Tomus XVII, Parma, Typis Petri Fiaccadori, 1864, 332-336.
